choose-track.title: What would you like to do?
choose-track.intro: Would you kindly choose a path to proceed with, please.

name-question.title: Name of the Figure
name-question.intro: Please enter the name of the figure.
name-question.note: Please use the full name of the figure for more accuracy. If you do not know the full name please refer to your items listing on your sellers website.

brand-question.title: Brand Name
brand-question.intro: Would you kindly enter the name of the brand this figure is from.

input.placeholder: Example: Kaiyodo, Medicom Toy, Max Factory, or e.t.c

brand-question.note: If you do not know what is the brand of your figure we recommend you to please look it up.
brand-question.extranote: Reason we would like the Brand is because it would exponentially help the search function.

product-question.title: Product Line Name
product-question.intro: Would you kindly enter the name of the Product Line of this figure.

input.placeholder: Example: figma, MAFEX, Revoltech, Amazing Yamaguchi, or e.t.c

product-question.note: If you do know what is the product line this figure originates from please consult the box this figure is from.
product-question.extranote: If unfortunately you do not own the box anymore or never had it we recomend you to look it up.

series-question.title: Series Line Name
series-question.intro: What is the name of the Series Line this figure is from?

input.placeholder: Example: "Spider-Man", Marvel Comics, Batman Hush, "Batman" Series, DC Comics, SEKIRO or e.t.c

series-question.note: Please use the series name for this figure. We recommend to be as specific as you possibly can to ensure the accuracy of information and data

sculpture-question.title: Sculptor Name
sculpture-question.intro: What is the Sculptor of this figure?

input.placeholder: Example: Katsuhisa Yamaguchi (sculptor of the Revoltech Amazing Yamaguchi Symbiote Spider-Man (Purple Ver.)), or e.t.c

sculpture-question.note: If in the case the sculptor is unknown, please do not hesitate to enter "UNKNOWN"

scale-question.title: Figure Scale
scale-question.intro: What is the scale of the figure?
scale-question.note: If you would be so kind to enter the scale your figure is according to.

material-question.title: Figure Materials
material-question.intro: What are the materials used for this figure? Select all that apply.
material-question.note: Select all materials that apply to your figure. Choose "Other" to add materials not listed.
material-question.otherPlaceholder: Enter other materials (e.g. Aluminum, Silicon, Metal)

seller-question.title: Place of Purchase
seller-question.intro: Where did you purchase this figure?

input.placeholder: Example: Amazon, eBay, BigBadToyStore, Hobby Link Japan, or e.t.c

seller-question.note: Please enter the seller or place of purchase.

age-question.title: Figure Age
age-question.note: Please select the approximate age of your figure since purchase.

auth-question.title: Figure Authenticity
auth-question.intro: Is this figure authentic or a bootleg?
auth-question.note: Please select whether your figure is an authentic product or a bootleg copy.

issue-question.title: Figure Issues
issue-question.intro: What type of issue does your figure have?
issue-question.note: Please select all that apply to your figure's issues.

issue-description-question.title: Issue Description
issue-description-question.intro: Please describe the issue in detail.

input.placeholder: Please provide a detailed description of the problem with your figure...

issue-description-question.note: The more detail you provide, the better we can help you find a solution.

splash.title: Summary
splash.text: Thank you for providing all the information!
